HomePage.heroSubtitle: We automate internal operations for SMEs.
HomePage.heroDesc: AI agents for business workflows. Turning fragmented processes into a unified engine for scale.
HomePage.approachDesc: A systematic method to engineering excellence.
HomePage.capabilitiesDesc: End-to-end technical expertise for modern enterprises.
HomePage.workDesc: A showcase of our engineering and design capabilities.
HomePage.boutiqueDesc: We bring the rigour of enterprise systems to agile teams. Systems are only as strong as the partnership behind them.
HomePage.boutiqueDesc2: No bloat, just pure efficiency. We integrate seamlessly with in-house teams, functioning as the architectural extension of your business.
HomePage.approachIntro: Beautiful brands fail without robust operations. We build the invisible engine that makes the front-end possible.
HomePage.approachHeadline: The invisible engine behind the brand.
HomePage.approachP1: Systems are more than just software—they are the physics of your business. We define the logic, architecture, and workflows that govern how value flows through your company.
HomePage.approachP2: By building a comprehensive operational language, we ensure consistency across every deal, from lead capture to delivery. It's about creating a system that scales with you, empowering your teams to execute with precision.
HomePage.capStep1Desc: We don't just write code. We analyze your business model to identify technological leverage points that drive revenue and efficiency.
HomePage.capStep2Desc: We deploy a dedicated team to build your proprietary software. No templates, just powerful, scalable platforms owned 100% by you.
HomePage.capStep3Desc: We ensure your infrastructure scales effortlessly with your success. Supporting millions of users without compromising performance.

AboutPage.focusCard1Desc: Cloud-native infrastructure designed to handle millions of requests without friction.
AboutPage.focusCard2Desc: We automate manual friction points to give your team room to breathe and scale.
AboutPage.focusCard3Desc: Clean code is just the beginning. We build systems that are strategic assets for your long-term roadmap.
AboutPage.lifeSubtitle: Join a high-intensity environment focused on pushing the boundaries of what's possible.

ServicesPage.heroSubtitle: We automate internal operations for SMEs.
ServicesPage.capabilitiesDesc: From concept to deployment, we cover the full stack.
ServicesPage.talentDesc: Skip the hiring headache. We provide the specialized engineering talent you need to move fast and scale securely.
ServicesPage.testimonialQuote: The team realized my vision of a learning ecosystem. Not just coding, they consulted on UX flow for the Shadowing feature, skyrocketing lesson completion rates.
ServicesPage.heroDesc: AI agents for business workflows. We architect operational systems that power high-velocity growth.
ServicesPage.cap1Desc: We engineer scalable, cloud-native platforms from day one. No low-code shortcuts. Just robust, production-grade software.
ServicesPage.cap2Desc: We decompile your manual workflows and reassemble them as automated systems. We kill operational friction with code.
ServicesPage.cap3Desc: Marketing is soft. Growth engineering is hard science. We implement A/B testing infrastructure and data loops to scientifically scale revenue.
ServicesPage.processStep1Desc: We audit your entire tech stack and clear operational friction. We identify legacy debt, security gaps, and performance bottlenecks.
ServicesPage.processStep2Desc: We execute rapid sprints to deploy the core infrastructure. Clean code, scalable architecture, and automated CI/CD pipelines.
ServicesPage.processStep3Desc: Ongoing growth engineering. We monitor, optimize, and ship features monthly to ensure your revenue engine never stalls.
ServicesPage.plan1Desc: Engineering proprietary software solutions and digitizing complex operational workflows.
ServicesPage.plan2Desc: Scale your internal engineering capacity with senior engineers integrated directly into your team.
ServicesPage.plan3Desc: Comprehensive overhaul of legacy systems and modernization of massive digital ecosystems.
ServicesPage.pricingDesc: We align our incentives with your success. Choose the model that fits your operational stage.
ServicesPage.smbPlan1Desc: Perfect starting solution: 5-7 pages Company site and 1 LP.
ServicesPage.smbPlan2Desc: High-converting Landing Page with lead capture to Sheets.
ServicesPage.smbPlan3Desc: Small online store with professional product listings.
ServicesPage.smbPlan4Desc: Basic MVP App / Portal (Authentication, List, Detail).
ServicesPage.smbPlan5Desc: Virtual Telegram/Chatbot assistant to capture leads.
ServicesPage.smbPlan6Desc: Multi-gateway payment integration and checkout management.

ContactPage.heroSubtitle: We automate internal operations for SMEs through AI agents for business workflows.
ContactPage.heroDesc: We define how businesses operate. From the first line of code to the final deployment, we build the infrastructure that powers revenue. Our approach combines strategic engineering with high-end craftsmanship to create systems that are scalable, distinct, and enduring.
ContactPage.careersDesc: We are always looking for exceptional talent in motion design, systems thinking, and strategy. If you believe your work can push boundaries, we want to hear from you.
